mano_cua.result_summary: Bug 确认复现：HTML 锚点链接点击后未滚动到锚点位置，而是打开了一个新的不存在 tiddler（#Bottom_of_tiddler-1427253606 - Missing tiddler）。TiddlyWiki 将 <a href='#anchor-name'> 拦截并当作 tiddler 导航处理，而非页面内跳转。URL 也被错误修改。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Clicking the 'Bottom' anchor link opened a new missing tiddler '#Bottom_of_tiddler-1427253606' instead of scrolling within the current tiddler. TiddlyWiki intercepts anchor links and treats them as tiddler navigation, breaking in-page scrolling functionality.
